questions.stem: This integrated schematic is used to review the pathway that statins ultimately modulate, spanning the liver, blood, enterocyte, and intestinal lumen. Which overall physiological process does it depict?

choices.label: C
choices.text: Renal handling of sodium and water

explanation.summary: The diagram traces cholesterol and triglyceride handling across hepatic synthesis, VLDL/LDL/HDL trafficking in blood, and intestinal absorption/reabsorption of cholesterol and bile acids, i.e., integrated lipoprotein metabolism, the pathway statins act on.
explanation.whyCorrect: The diagram traces cholesterol and triglyceride handling across hepatic synthesis, VLDL/LDL/HDL trafficking in blood, and intestinal absorption/reabsorption of cholesterol and bile acids, i.e., integrated lipoprotein metabolism, the pathway statins act on.
